# Non Linear Least Squares

**Summary**: An optimization algorithm used to find the best fit for parameters in a mathematical model.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-makki|Makki, 2024]] used nonlinear least squares to fit Thomsen parameters (epsilon and delta) to measured P-wave velocity data.

## Key Results and Findings

- The algorithm successfully fitted the TTI model with an error of 1.67%. ([[2024-makki|Makki, 2024, p. 75]])
